payload.author: claude
payload.body:
AGENT BRIEFING (read before investigating).

FULL CONTEXT: read epic SCP-120 and validation spike SCP-121 first (thesis = agent-operated multiplayer kanban).

DECIDED CONSTRAINTS: offline-first required v1; tenant isolation must be airtight (coordinate w/ SCP-122 auth); actor = '{model} on behalf of {user}'.

WHERE TO LOOK:
- src/db.js (SQLite schema, migrations, WAL)
- src/event-store.js (append-only ULID JSON = source of truth)
- src/replay.js (replay log -> cache)
- src/repo.js (data layer), src/workspaces.js (multi-workspace today)
- docs/adr/0001-decentralized-ticket-identity.md

NOTE: a prior investigation already produced a proposed architecture + child tickets for this spike — see the next comment ('PRIOR PROPOSAL'). Build on it; do not start from scratch. Coordinate w/ SCP-122 (isolation) and SCP-125 (appends are the fan-out event source).

DELIVERABLE: refine the prior proposal if needed, then spawn the storage implementation child stories with parent=SCP-120.
